content: Godot 4 sky shaders: EYEDIR is world-space direction (not camera-relative). Sky shader renders before 3D geometry and before post-process. Built-ins: EYEDIR (world-space normalized view direction), POSITION (camera world pos), AT_CUBEMAP_PASS, AT_HALF_RES_PASS, LIGHT0-3_DIRECTION/COLOR/ENERGY/ENABLED. COLOR is output. Star points are drawn via dot(EYEDIR, star_dir) > threshold then smoothstep. Radiance cubemap updates trigger when any uniform is changed per frame. Sky passes through WorldEnvironment glow/bloom.
